Permanent Jewellery

A seamless piece made for you.

Your chosen gold-filled chain is measured, custom-fitted and joined with one precise weld. There is no clasp, and the process is quick and painless.

Gold-filled

Chosen for its beautiful gold finish and durability for everyday wear when cared for properly.

Personal

Every piece is measured to you and can mark a friendship, milestone, promise or meaningful moment.

How It Works

Four simple steps.

01

Choose

Select your favourite gold-filled chain and any optional connector or charm.

02

Fit

We measure and adjust the chain until the fit feels comfortable and looks beautiful.

03

Weld

The final link is joined with a quick, precise and painless spark.

04

Celebrate

Leave wearing a seamless piece created for your story.

The Auréline Promise

Crafted with care.

Every piece is custom-fitted and permanently welded by our expert. If your chain breaks at the weld, we will re-weld it free of charge, subject to inspection and our care terms.

Every piece comes with a meaning card to remember the moment, the people and the memories that matter most.

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know.

Does it hurt?

No. The spark joins the metal only and does not touch your skin.

Can it be removed?

Yes. It can be cut safely with scissors or jewellery cutters when necessary.

Can I travel with it?

Permanent jewellery is generally fine for normal airport security. Follow any specific instructions given by security staff.

What about medical scans?

Always tell your medical provider and follow their instructions. You may be asked to remove it before certain procedures.

Is it waterproof?

Gold-filled jewellery is suitable for everyday wear, but careful treatment helps preserve its finish.

What if it breaks?

Contact us. Breaks at the weld are eligible for a complimentary re-weld, subject to inspection and care terms.
